steps.title: Look for a sample difference
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two samples. The notes give a clear difference: the natural rubber fiber sample was 2.2 millimeters thick, while the NiTi wire sample was 0.7 millimeters thick.

steps.title: Reject similarities and context
steps.content: Choice B gives general study context, Choice C emphasizes that both samples warmed, and Choice D gives a general definition. The remaining choice directly contrasts the samples' thicknesses. The answer is A.
